result:
The R script has successfully cleaned and preprocessed the survey datasets. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains:

1. NSID - the cohort member identifier
2. ecoactdtma14-ecoactdtma17 - Mother's detailed economic activity at ages 14-17 (recoded to 6-category scheme)
3. ecoactdtpa14-ecoactdtpa17 - Father's detailed economic activity at ages 14-17 (recoded to 6-category scheme)

All variables have been:
- Standardized with proper missing value codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked)
- Recoded to a harmonized 6-category employment scheme (Paid work 30+ hrs, Paid work <30 hrs, Unemployed, Training, Education, Home/Retired/Sick/Other)
- Converted to labeled factors with explicit labels
- Named according to conventions (ecoactdtm = mother's detailed economic activity, ecoactdtp = father's detailed economic activity, with age suffixes)
